data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having separate profiles per family member. However, the evidence does not include any API reads or state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for separate profiles, but there is no direct evidence or API interaction that demonstrates this requirement is implemented, leading to a clear gap in coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of separate profiles per family member.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the separate profiles requirement.
